violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Top of dish machine has build-up of debris and needs cleaning. Reach in units have build-up of dust around compressors and need cleaning. Detail cleaning needed to line cooking equipment. Grease build-up.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors have build up of grease under line cooking equipment. Floors need cleaning under equipment and storage shelving in walk in cooler, under equipment in ice cream area, and under ice machine.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. Store mops in a position that allows proper drying at both utility sinks.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
